channel.title: Academic Satire | Prof Y Not's Comedy Books
channel.description: Discover hilarious satire books by Academic Satire. Academic comedy, witty humor, and laugh-out-loud reads available on Amazon Kindle and paperback.

item.title: From Bromance to Romance: The Ultimate Guide
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of bromance dynamics and why How to Let Bro Know That You Want to Be More Than Friends is the manual you need right now.

item.title: How to Let Bro Know That You Want to Be More Than Friends: 7 Ways to Turn Bromance into Romance
item.description: Are You Ready to Laugh at Your Own Misery? The ultimate satirical guide to navigating the treacherous waters between bromance and romance. 7 hilariously terrible strategies that definitely won’t backfire. In a world obsessed with perfection, high achievement, and maintaining a curated Instagram feed, How to Let Bro Know That You Want to Be More Than Friends comes as a breath of fresh air (or a sigh of relief). This isn’t just a book; it’s a mirror reflecting the hilarity of our modern struggles.

item.title: How To Make Your Cat Pay Your Bills: Shocking Tips The IRS Doesn't Want You To Know
item.description: Are You Ready to Laugh at Your Own Misery? The definitive satirical guide to feline financial responsibility. Shocking tips the IRS doesn’t want you to know about turning your cat into a breadwinner. In a world obsessed with passive income, side hustles, and financial independence, How To Make Your Cat Pay Your Bills comes as a breath of fresh air (or a sigh of relief). This isn’t just a book; it’s a mirror reflecting the hilarity of our modern financial struggles and our unhealthy codependency with cats.

item.title: The Worm Question: Why We Test Our Partners' Loyalty
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of relationship loyalty tests and why Will My Boyfriend Still Love Me Even If I’m a Worm is the manual you need right now.

item.title: They Cannot Outsmart You If You Are Not Smart: 7 Ways to Stay Dumb
item.description: Are You Ready to Laugh at Your Own Misery? The definitive satirical guide to weaponizing stupidity. Why bother being smart when being dumb is so much easier and way more fun? In a world obsessed with IQ scores, hustle culture, and knowing things, They Cannot Outsmart You If You Are Not Smart comes as a breath of fresh air (or a sigh of relief). This isn’t just a book; it’s a mirror reflecting the hilarity of our modern struggles with intelligence.

item.title: Why Being Smart Is Overrated: A Satirical Deep Dive
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of intelligence culture and why They Cannot Outsmart You If You Are Not Smart is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Will My Boyfriend Still Love Me Even If I'm a Worm? And Other Ways to Prove His Loyalty
item.description: Are You Ready to Laugh at Your Own Misery? The ultimate satirical relationship loyalty test. Would he still love you if you were a worm? A slug? A sentient houseplant? Time to find out. In a world obsessed with love languages, attachment styles, and relationship podcasts, Will My Boyfriend Still Love Me Even If I’m a Worm? comes as a breath of fresh air (or a sigh of relief). This isn’t just a book; it’s a mirror reflecting the hilarity of our modern relationship anxieties.

item.title: Your Cat Is a Financial Freeloader and It's Time to Talk About It
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of cat ownership economics and why How To Make Your Cat Pay Your Bills is the manual you need right now.

item.title: 10 Signs You've Spent Too Long in Academia (A Satirist's Guide)
item.description: You know you’ve spent too long in academia when the phrase “let’s table this discussion” fills you with both rage and resignation. Here are ten signs that the ivory tower has become less of a workplace and more of a lifestyle. 1. You Have Opinions About Fonts Not just “Comic Sans is unprofessional” opinions. We’re talking “I can’t take this email seriously because they used Calibri instead of Times New Roman, and everyone knows Calibri is for people who’ve given up” opinions.

item.title: Analysis Paralysis: Why Picking Dinner Ruins Your Life
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Decision Fatigue & Overthinking and why How To Be Exhausted By Decisions That Don’t Matter is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Barber Shop Anxiety: Dodging Sausages and Small Talk
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Awkward Encounters and why HOW TO DODGE THE BARBER’S SAUSAGE WHILE GETTING A HAIRCUT is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Broke but Confident: How to Survive Inflation with Swag
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Financial Satire and why How To Be Broke With Confidence is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Dating Nightmares: Holding in Farts and Other Rom-Com Lies
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Dating Disasters and why How To Hold In Your Fart When Talking To Your Crush is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Energy Saving Mode: Why Laziness is Just Efficiency in Disguise
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Productivity Satire and why I’m Not Lazy I’m On Energy Saving Mode is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Facing Your Problems When the Problem is Your Face
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Self-Esteem Satire and why How Can You Face Your Problem When the Problem Is Your Face ? is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Faking Success: How to Wing It Until You Make It
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Faking Success and why I Have No Idea What I am Doing But It’s Working is the manual you need right now.

item.title: Fitness Satire: Why I Want to Donate My Body Fat
item.description: We explore the hilarious reality of Diet & Fitness Satire and why How Can I Double My Body Fat And Give It To The Next Person is the manual you need right now.

item.title: How Can I Double My Body Fat And Give It To The Next Person
item.description: Are You Ready to Laugh at Your Own Misery? A wildly absurd, laugh-out-loud collection of satirical stories that poke fun at self-help culture and miracle fitness hacks. In a world obsessed with perfection, high achievement, and maintaining a curated Instagram feed, How Can I Double My Body Fat And Give It To The Next Person comes as a breath of fresh air (or a sigh of relief). This isn’t just a book; it’s a mirror reflecting the hilarity of our modern struggles.

item.title: How Can You Face Your Problem When the Problem Is Your Face ?
item.description: Are You Ready to Laugh at Your Own Misery? A hilarious collection of satire and painfully relatable stories about the everyday disasters we all pretend we’re too mature to still experience. In a world obsessed with perfection, high achievement, and maintaining a curated Instagram feed, How Can You Face Your Problem When the Problem Is Your Face ? comes as a breath of fresh air (or a sigh of relief). This isn’t just a book; it’s a mirror reflecting the hilarity of our modern struggles.

item.title: How To Achieve Burnout Without Achieving Anything
item.description: Are You Ready to Laugh at Your Own Misery? Tired of ‘rising and grinding’ toward a nervous breakdown? Stop accidentally succeeding and learn to fail with intention. In a world obsessed with perfection, high achievement, and maintaining a curated Instagram feed, How To Achieve Burnout Without Achieving Anything comes as a breath of fresh air (or a sigh of relief). This isn’t just a book; it’s a mirror reflecting the hilarity of our modern struggles.
